chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1274 of 2023 (Khan Muhammad Samtio versus Province of Sindh & others) Present: Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J. Mr. Arbab Ali Hakro, J. Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.270/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.5396/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case Date of hearing: 23.01.2024 Date of decision: 23.01.2024 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner. O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J. – Petitioner is seeking directions through this petition to official respondents to decide his application for taking legal action against respondent No.6 against his alleged corrupt practices and use of official powers. 2. We have asked learned Counsel to explain the locus standi of petitioner to file this petition, who, without approaching the concerned department, has directly come to this Court. In reply, he has referred to one application available at Page No.11 to justify maintainability of this petition. This document is purportedly an application to Director General FIA, Sukkur, but without any date and without any acknowledgement receipt by the addressee, hence of no use. 3. Be that as it may, petitioner’s Counsel has failed to show petitioner’s locus standi prompting him to file application against respondent No.6 and maintain this petition. This being the position, we do not find any merit in it and accordingly dismiss this petition in limine along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
